toolRequests.arguments:
{"filePath": "/Users/dzulqaidar/go/src/prabogo/prabogo/README.md", "oldString": "When working with AI agents, Entire automatically captures your session context and links it to commits without cluttering your Git history.

**Before running the app, copy the example environment file:**", "newString": "When working with AI agents, Entire automatically captures your session context and links it to commits without cluttering your Git history.

### Checkpoints

A **checkpoint** is a snapshot of your AI session — it captures the prompts, agent responses, and code changes made during a development session. Checkpoints are stored on a separate Git branch so they never pollute your main history.

**List all sessions and their checkpoints:**

```sh
entire sessions list
```

**View details of a specific checkpoint:**

```sh
entire sessions show <session-id>
```

**Resume a previous session from a checkpoint:**

```sh
entire sessions resume <session-id>
```

Use checkpoints to understand the context behind any commit, hand off work to teammates, or pick up where you left off after an interruption.

**Before running the app, copy the example environment file:**"}

arguments.newString:
When working with AI agents, Entire automatically captures your session context and links it to commits without cluttering your Git history.

### Checkpoints

A **checkpoint** is a snapshot of your AI session — it captures the prompts, agent responses, and code changes made during a development session. Checkpoints are stored on a separate Git branch so they never pollute your main history.

**List all sessions and their checkpoints:**

```sh
entire sessions list
```

**View details of a specific checkpoint:**

```sh
entire sessions show <session-id>
```

**Resume a previous session from a checkpoint:**

```sh
entire sessions resume <session-id>
```

Use checkpoints to understand the context behind any commit, hand off work to teammates, or pick up where you left off after an interruption.

**Before running the app, copy the example environment file:**

data.content:
Added a **Checkpoints** section under the Entire.io Integration explaining what a checkpoint is and how to use these commands:

- `entire sessions list` — list all sessions and checkpoints
- `entire sessions show <session-id>` — view a specific checkpoint's details
- `entire sessions resume <session-id>` — resume work from a checkpoint
